github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: Mirror nearby code, keep changes small, and validate the result against the existing Ant/JSP/Servlet structure before finishing.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Write the smallest regression check first when possible. Prefer Arrange-Act-Assert, targeted compilation, or a deterministic runtime check if the project has no test harness in the touched area.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Review for security issues, session and redirect bugs, SQL mistakes, XSS, missing validation, and regressions against nearby DAO, service, servlet, filter, and JSP patterns.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use conventional commit format: <type>: <description>. Types: feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, chore, perf, ci. Keep the subject under 72 characters and describe why the change matters.
